programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy seeks the death penalty in the case of a teenager accused of murdering a restaurant owner during an ill-fated delivery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen and a new generation of illusionists join forces to steal the world's largest diamond from a South African mogul who heads an international crime syndicate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: Two ballers, opposites who are seemingly miles apart, find they might have more in common than they imagined possible.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programme.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programme.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: The annual land blessing is thrown into disarray when one of the campers goes missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: An incident at work causes Bash to second-guess himself; Mags is inspired by a firefighter devoted to her work, even if it means risking her life on a daily basis, and June must learn to work with others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent offers self-serve; Lacey goes buffet style at the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: The air conditioner breaks at Corner Gas; Karen and Davis win the meat lottery.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay man is murdered and his adopted son taken in a case that first looks like a kidnapping until the facts uncover the possibility of a hate crime.

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.desc: The Islanders take a trip to Lake Tahoe; Bryan's attempt to greet Amaya causes a heated fallout; Iris confronts Belle-A about their issues; Chris' actions leave Coco uneasy about their relationship; the girls are divided.

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.desc: Gracyn, Belle-A and Coco confront Iris and Hannah about feeling iced out; Amaya lets Bryan know her boundaries; Chris and Coco decide what's next for them; Andreina calls out Jeremiah's mixed signals.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Penguin Lessons
programme.desc: An Englishman experiences personal and political changes after adopting a penguin during a turbulent time in Argentina's history.

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiance, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into early retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving.

programme.title: Triumph: Rock & Roll Machine
programme.desc: The story of underdog Canadian rock band Triumph, which rose to stardom in the 1970s and '80s only to disappear at the height of its fame.

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military, M must reinstate Bond, as he is the only agent who can beat SPECTRE at their own game of espionage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie and Cal find themselves facing a dire situation as they look for a missing camper.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programme.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy the shape-shifting Pennywise -- now more powerful than ever.

programme.desc: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over "The Cookie Jar." When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court.

programme.desc: Bash wants to make things right with Amira after their lives are turned upside down once again.

programme.desc: Oscar and Emma enjoy Lacey's company in their new hot tub a lot more than Lacey enjoys theirs; the police department introduces Safety Pete.

programme.desc: A pro basketball player is a suspect in a shooting that killed a pregnant banker and left her fetus clinging to life.

programme.title: Anniversary
programme.desc: Tensions rise and loyalties are tested when a couple meet their son's new girlfriend, a radical young woman who's part of a controversial movement known as the Change.
